ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the team */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference of the team */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division of the team */,
  "salary_cap" INTEGER /* Salary cap of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position played by the player */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "college" TEXT /* College or university of the player */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_round" INTEGER /* Round the player was drafted */,
  "draft_pick" INTEGER /* Pick the player was drafted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contracts" (
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contract */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player signing the contract */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team offering the contract */,
  "year_end" INTEGER /* Year the contract ends */,
  "salary" INTEGER /* Salary amount of the contract */,
  "below_minimum" INTEGER /* Whether the contract is below the minimum salary */,
  "contract_type" TEXT /* Type of contract (e.g., rookie contract, max contract, etc.) */,
  "contract_length" INTEGER /* Length of the contract (in years) */,
  "guaranteed_amount" INTEGER /* Guaranteed amount of the contract */,
  "signing_date" TEXT /* Date the contract was signed */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date the contract expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contract_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contracts_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contracts_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "salary_history" (
  "salary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each salary entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the salary was recorded */,
  "salary" INTEGER /* Salary amount for the year */,
  "salary_type" TEXT /* Type of salary (e.g., base salary, signing bonus, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("salary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_salary_history_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trades" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade */,
  "trade_date" TEXT /* Date the trade occurred */,
  "team_id_from" INTEGER /* ID of the team trading the player away */,
  "team_id_to" INTEGER /* ID of the team receiving the player */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player being traded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_team_id_to FOREIGN KEY ("team_id_to") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_team_id_from FOREIGN KEY ("team_id_from") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contract_extensions" (
  "extension_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contract extension */,
  "extension_date" TEXT /* Date the contract was extended */,
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contract being extended */,
  "new_contract_length" INTEGER /* New length of the contract (in years) */,
  "new_contract_amount" INTEGER /* New amount of the contract */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("extension_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contract_extensions_contract_id FOREIGN KEY ("contract_id") REFERENCES contracts ("contract_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "salary_renegotiations" (
  "renegotiation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each salary renegotiation */,
  "renegotiation_date" TEXT /* Date the salary was renegotiated */,
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contract being renegotiated */,
  "new_salary_amount" INTEGER /* New salary amount */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the renegotiation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("renegotiation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_salary_renegotiations_contract_id FOREIGN KEY ("contract_id") REFERENCES contracts ("contract_id")
)
